description_long: This object is an ornate egg with a textured, scale-like surface pattern. The upper half is a metallic turquoise blue, while the lower half is a deep metallic purple, separated by a shiny gold band that encircles the widest part of the egg. The gold band features embossed teardrop-shaped motifs, adding to its decorative appeal. The surface is highly reflective and glossy, giving it a luxurious, jewel-like appearance. The egg appears solid and smooth to the touch, with no visible openings or functional parts. Its design suggests it is intended as a decorative or collectible item, possibly inspired by Fabergé eggs.
description: A decorative egg with a metallic turquoise and purple scale pattern, divided by a gold embossed band. The surface is glossy and highly reflective, giving it a luxurious appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the turquoise upper half, purple lower half, and the gold band with embossed teardrop motifs clearly visible.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view, maintaining clear visibility of the color division and gold band, with the scale texture prominent.
description_view_2: Another rotated view, gold band and scale pattern remain visible, with light reflecting off the glossy surface.
description_view_3: Back view, similar to the front, with the same color split and decorative gold band encircling the egg.
attribute_orientation: upright with the pointed end facing up
attribute_contextual_placement: Most likely used as a decorative centerpiece or collectible item, especially in festive or luxurious settings.
attribute_decorative_patterns: scale-like pattern with embossed teardrop motifs on a gold band
